context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the entity-model skill's validation rule vocabulary, prescribed data types with their length/precision, multi-column constraints syntax, and structural formatting rules when generating an entity model from a requirements document for an online course enrollment platform.

checklist.name: Email validation rule
checklist.description: The student's email attribute uses the validation rule 'Not Null, Format: Email' (exactly this value, not 'Not Null' alone or a custom format string)

checklist.name: Decimal type for price
checklist.description: The course price (or fee) attribute uses 'Decimal' as the Data Type (not VARCHAR, DECIMAL(10,2), NUMERIC, or any SQL type)

checklist.name: Decimal precision 10,2
checklist.description: The course price attribute has '10,2' in the Length/Precision column

checklist.name: Enrollment status uses Values rule
checklist.description: The enrollment status attribute uses a validation rule in the form 'Not Null, Values: X, Y, Z' (listing the allowed values such as Pending, Active, Completed, Cancelled)

checklist.name: Multi-column constraint line
checklist.description: A '**Constraints:**' line appears after the ENROLLMENT attribute table stating that the end date must be after the start date (or equivalent wording)

checklist.name: 5-column attribute tables
checklist.description: Every entity attribute table has exactly 5 columns: Attribute, Description, Data Type, Length/Precision, Validation Rules

checklist.name: No empty Validation Rules
checklist.description: Every row in every attribute table has a non-empty Validation Rules value (no blank cells, dashes, or 'N/A')

checklist.name: Allowed data types only
checklist.description: All Data Type column values are drawn exclusively from: Long, String, Integer, Decimal, Boolean, Date, DateTime — no SQL types like VARCHAR, BIGINT, or TEXT appear

checklist.name: No attributes in Mermaid diagram
checklist.description: The Mermaid erDiagram block shows only entity names and relationship lines — no attribute lists or column definitions appear inside entity blocks

checklist.name: No prose descriptions
checklist.description: The document does NOT contain prose lines like 'Key attributes: ...' and does NOT include a 'Relationships' table section

checklist.name: Uppercase entity headings
checklist.description: Each entity section uses a ### heading with the entity name in UPPERCASE (e.g., ### STUDENT, ### COURSE, ### ENROLLMENT)
